relevant_uses.product_type: The product is intended for research, analysis and scientific education.
relevant_uses.lcs: PW: Widespread use by professional workers

prevention: Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking.
Wear protective gloves/protective clothing and eye protection/face protection.
response: IF ON SKIN (or hair): Take off immediately all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water [or shower].
IF INHALED: Remove person to fresh air and keep comfortable for breathing.
IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing.

other_hazards.physicochemical: In case of insufficient ventilation and/or through use, explosive/highly flammable mixtures may develop.
other_hazards.health: This product does not contain a substance that has endocrine disrupting properties with respect to humans as no components meets the criteria.

mixture_components.name: Propan-1-ol
classification: Flam. Liq. 2: Highly flammable liquid and vapour.
Eye Dam. 1: Causes serious eye damage.
STOT SE 3: May cause drowsiness or dizziness.

mixture_components.name: Ethanol
classification: Flam. Liq. 2: Highly flammable liquid and vapour.

description.general: In case of accident or unwellness, seek medical advice immediately (show directions for use or safety data sheet if possible). Remove victim out of the danger area. Remove contaminated, saturated clothing immediately. Do not leave affected person unattended. If unconscious but breathing normally, place in recovery position and seek medical advice. Warning First aider: Pay attention to self-protection!
description.inhalation: Provide fresh air. In case of respiratory tract irritation, consult a physician. Get medical advice/attention if you feel unwell.
description.skin: After contact with skin, wash immediately with plenty of water and soap. Take off immediately all contaminated clothing. If skin irritation or rash occurs: Get medical advice/attention.
description.eye: In case of contact with eyes flush immediately with plenty of flowing water for 10 to 15 minutes holding eyelids apart and consult an ophthalmologist.
description.ingestion: Rinse mouth. Get medical advice/attention if you feel unwell. Let 1 glass of water be drunken in little sips (dilution effect).

section_5.suitable_media: Water spray jet , alcohol resistant foam , Extinguishing powder , Carbon dioxide (CO2)
section_5.special_hazards: Combustible . Vapours are heavier than air, spread along floors and form explosive mixtures with air.
section_5.combustion_products: In case of fire: Carbon monoxide , Carbon dioxide (CO2) . Vapours can form explosive mixtures with air.
section_5.firefighter_advice: Fight fire with normal precautions from a reasonable distance. Wear a self-contained breathing apparatus and chemical protective clothing.
section_5.additional_info: Collect contaminated fire extinguishing water separately. Do not allow entering drains or surface water.

section_6.personal_precautions: Remove persons to safety. Use personal protective equipment as required. Avoid contact with skin, eyes and clothes.
section_6.protective_equipment: Wear protective gloves/protective clothing and eye protection/face protection.
section_6.environmental_precautions: Do not allow to enter into surface water or drains.
section_6.containment: Absorb with liquid-binding material (sand, diatomaceous earth, acid- or universal binding agents).
section_6.other_sections: Safe handling: see section 7 , Personal protection equipment: see section 8 , Disposal: see section 13
section_6.additional_info: Use appropriate container to avoid environmental contamination.

section_7.safe_handling: Wear personal protection equipment (refer to section 8). Wash hands before breaks and after work. Keep away from: Food and feedingstuffs . If local exhaust ventilation is not possible or not sufficient, the entire working area should be ventilated by technical means. Do not breathe mist/vapours/spray.
section_7.fire_prevention: Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Vapours can form explosive mixtures with air.
section_7.occupational_hygiene: Avoid contact with skin, eyes and clothes. When using do not eat, drink, smoke, sniff.
section_7.storage_conditions: Keep container tightly closed in a cool, well-ventilated place. Keep out of reach of children.
section_7.storage_rooms: Keep container tightly closed in a cool, well-ventilated place. Recommended storage temperature : at room temperature . Protect from sunlight.
section_7.storage_assembly: Do not store together with: Food and feedingstuffs ( TRGS 510 )

section_8.control_parameters_comments: If local exhaust ventilation is not possible or not sufficient, the entire working area should be ventilated by technical means. FEITSCH.0093 Avoid breathing vapours and spray.
section_8.respiratory_protection: Usually no personal respirative protection necessary. This product should not be used under conditions of poor ventilation unless a protective mask with an appropriate gas filter (i.e. type A1 according to standard EN 14387) is used.
section_8.eye_protection: Eye glasses with side protection ( EN 166 )
section_8.skin_protection: Tested protective gloves must be worn ( EN ISO 374 ). Take recovery periods for skin regeneration. Breakthrough times and swelling properties of the material must be taken into consideration. Suitable material: Butyl caoutchouc (butyl rubber) , Thickness of the glove material : > 0,35 mm. In the case of wanting to use the gloves again, clean them before taking off and air them well.

safety_data.parameter: Initial boiling point and boiling range

section_10.reactivity: This material is considered to be non-reactive under normal use conditions.
section_10.chemical_stability: The product is chemically stable under recommended conditions of storage, use and temperature.
section_10.hazardous_reactions: No hazardous reaction when handled and stored according to provisions.
section_10.conditions_to_avoid: Further information on proper storage: see section 7.
section_10.hazardous_decomposition: No known hazardous decomposition products. Decomposition products in case of fire: see section 5.

section_13.waste_treatment: Consult the appropriate local waste disposal expert about waste disposal. Completely emptied packages can be recycled.
